title: ciconium inquinans
side_effects: Ciconium inquinans can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high alkaloid content. In severe cases, improper use of the plant can also lead to headaches, dizziness, and even seizures. Additionally, prolonged exposure to its toxic compounds can cause damage to the liver and kidneys, and may increase the risk of certain types of cancer. It is essential to consult a medical professional or an expert in herbal remedies before using ciconium inquinans to avoid these adverse effects.
